---
title: "Assistant Professor"
image: "images/avatar.jpg"
color1: "#5A59A3"
color2: "#C66060"
angle: 130
links:
    - label: '`r fontawesome::fa("github")`'
      url: "https://github.com/Cdishop"
    - label: '`r fontawesome::fa("graduation-cap")`'
      url: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=VSTAif8AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao"
output:
  postcards::onofre
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# Learn more about creating websites with Distill at:
# https://rstudio.github.io/distill/website.html

```

I lead the RocMob at Auburn University, a research group focused on cooperation and organizational behavior in modern work environments (RocMob: Research on cooperation and modern organizational behavior). Organizational theory on cooperation was developed by studying face-to-face, manufacturing-style work arrangements. The RobMob examines how contemporary work environments (e.g., remote jobs, asynchronous teamwork, algorithms and AI-supported teams) influence employees’ abilities to cooperate, support one another, and remain productive.
